---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Mahshad Sarikhani"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: hero-notes
    contents: 
      - "notes/**/*.qmd"
      - "!notes/index.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: assets/templates/hero-note.ejs
    max-items: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, maturity, path, description]
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
---

::: {.hero-section .hero-section--solo}

::: {.hero-left}
![](assets/img/headshot.jpg){.hero-photo}

[Mahshad *Sarikhani*]{.hero-name}

[MD · quantitative and computational methods for IBD imaging]{.hero-tagline}

::: {.hero-bio}
A doctor who codes. I work on quantitative MRI in inflammatory bowel disease, building Bayesian and agentic models that turn imaging into something measurable.

My focus is colonic motility and disease activity in ulcerative colitis, measured from MR enterography. The methods carry across that work: multilevel Bayesian models that respect uncertainty, and agentic pipelines that turn unstructured radiology text into data you can audit.
:::

:::

:::

::: {.worklist}
::: {.worklist-label}
[selected work]{} [[research →](research/index.qmd)]{}
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Colonic motility on MRE and endoscopic activity in ulcerative colitis](research/index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[Jun 2026]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
ESGAR 2026 oral presentation · Manuscript ready to submit
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Bayesian risk stratification for non-invasive triage of UC activity](research/index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[Jun 2026]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
ESGAR 2026 oral presentation · preprint in preparation
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Agentic MRE pipeline](projects/mre-pipeline/index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[in progress]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Structuring free-text radiology reports with LLMs
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[IBD Imaging Digest](projects/ibd-digest/index.qmd){.worklist-title}
[live tool]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
A daily pipeline that fetches, ranks, and tiers new IBD imaging papers
:::
:::

:::

::: {.worklist}
::: {.worklist-label}
[recent notes]{} [[all →](notes/index.qmd)]{}
:::

::: {#hero-notes}
:::
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin: 3rem 0 2rem; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #4a9a88; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;"}
[About](about/index.qmd) · [Research](research/index.qmd) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iKhNW9AAAAAJ) · [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa)
:::
